title: Digital Marketing / Agency templates: Let's pool resources
excerpt:
MDC does a poor job of providing templates / workflows for our industry. This is clear from the large number of “Need to hire specialist” posts.

posts.author: AZQA (Justin)
posts.cookedHtml:
MDC does a poor job of providing templates / workflows for our industry. This is clear from the large number of “Need to hire specialist” posts.

I am going to start organizing some resources. If you are interested in learning more, participating in gathering resources, or have additional insight please let me know.

posts.author: Dani (Dani Lester)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @AZQA

Just wanted to follow up here and see if you were able to find all of the information you were looking for?

In either case I wanted to post some links you might find helpful to check out:

  • Manage your creative requests with monday.com
  • Adobe Creative Cloud Integration: You can now visualise your entire design process, communicate and review your progress and collaborate within one workspace using our Adobe Creative Cloud integration!
  • Template: Creative Project Management
  • Template: Manage weekly design projects
  • Template: Managing design projects
  • Getting started for marketing - project planning | monday.com webinars - YouTube
  • monday.com for Marketing Teams | monday.com - YouTube

I hope this helps! Remember to mark as solved if this answers your question

Best,

Dani

posts.author: Dani (Dani Lester)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi again @AZQA

I hope the answers in this thread are useful!
As we haven’t had any updates here, I’m going to go ahead and mark this thread as solved.
This means that the thread will close in 7 days time

If you have any additional questions or you feel your original query wasn’t resolved, please feel free to let us know and we’ll be happy to continue to assist!

Best,

Dani

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
